title: thymus serpyllum f. transsilvanicus
intro: Thymus serpyllum f. transsilvanicus, also known as Transylvanian thyme, is a subspecies of the thyme plant, a low-growing, flowering herb native to Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory compounds that can help to combat infections and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Thymus serpyllum f. transsilvanicus include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and boost the immune system. Thymus serpyllum f. transsilvanicus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal blends and topical applications.
